ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked camino del ray at position 4 with only 12.0% probability. Top pick was Gennadius (20.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Gennadius > King Of York, but actual result was Camino Del Ray > Phaedra. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Camino Del Ray had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 2.5%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
